name: gen_rename_variables
output_code: public class Solution { public ListNode removeNthFromEnd(ListNode head, int n) { ListNode dummy = new ListNode(0, head); ListNode fast = head; ListNode slow = dummy; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) fast = fast.next; while (fast != null) { fast = fast.next; slow = slow.next; } slow.next = slow.next.next; return dummy.next; } }

name: gen_extract_mod_constant
raw_content: public class Solution { private static final int MOD = 1000000007; public int compute(int n) { int result = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { result = result * i % MOD; } return result; } }
